title: Game Evangelion Battlefields
wikitext:
[]: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields"             Quote Post by scenikeight » Thu Sep 12, 2019 4:07 am Sorry if someone already made a thread on this, I hadn't seen it yet. A new Eva game was announced at the Tokyo Game Show today. The game is called Evangelion Battlefields (エヴァンゲリオンバトルフィールズ). EDIT: It's a smartphone game, not a console game like I originally thought. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EsnqZZqlN68 (Official video, doesn't have audio ???) This might not be correct but I THINK it's an online game of some kind (says it's a "network" type game, I think this means online game, but googling the term it used just comes up with the promotional video for the game itself so...thanks...). It's set in the Rebuild universe. It's also a Skylanders-type game, which means you collect figures and put them on a podium to insert characters into the game. It looks like the base pack will come with the Unit-01 podium, Shinji, Rei and Mari, although I would be surprised if Asuka and Kaworu aren't also included in it, I can't see either of their figures anywhere yet so they're probably unfinished. Pictured seems to be, from left to right, Toji, Misato(?), Ritsuko, Mari, (I think this is Rei in her school uniform), Maya. I'm not sure how everyone feels about it being a Skylanders-type game, but I'm pretty excited to see another Eva game after so long regardless. I hope it gets a Western release. Edit: Changed the name of the thread since the game has already been released. -Zusuchan

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Microsoft_Sam » Thu Sep 12, 2019 4:45 am Interesting, but I hear it's a mobile game actually. Does look like a 3D rebuild though, so I'll give whoever's developing the game props for that. Wake me up when we get something EVA-Related from Capcom or Square Enix or somethin'.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by scenikeight » Thu Sep 12, 2019 6:02 am Microsoft_Sam wrote: Interesting, but I hear it's a mobile game actually.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by MirrorUniverseAsuka » Thu Sep 12, 2019 6:34 am Mobile and Skylanders? Goddamnit.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Sep 24, 2019 9:38 am If this was on console, I'd 103% be playing it and collecting any and all of the figures, but on mobile, I think I'll pass. Having these figure setups is great on a home console, but way too much of a hassle to do on a mobile device

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by supersonicshion » Thu Mar 05, 2020 9:34 am Hope those figures are in scale with Portraits

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Mar 24, 2020 7:45 pm So, first wave of figures and 00/01 controller are up for sale on HLJ now. 138.41 bucks total. Yea no.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 28, 2020 6:12 pm I have seen some cutscenes with minor little character interactions on youtube (I've seen some on youtube - like the one where Touji tries to get a moody Shinji to cheer up or the one where Maya tells Rei to take a break once in a while) also there's a new Original character in the vein of Mayumi/Mana/Maria in a nice red and white plugsuit. Here are some of them If anyone with the means to do so would compile them all and possibly everything else in the vein of "plot" they would have my eternal gratitude

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 01, 2020 8:31 pm New pilot is Kotone Suzunami (涼波コトネ). Mark.06-looking lady is Hitomi Amagi (天城ヒトミ).

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat May 02, 2020 6:10 pm Damnit.... I looked up the character Kotone Suzunami and I really liked her design. ... When can I get merchandise of her?

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jun 09, 2020 7:57 am In the clips I've seen so far she seems to have a preppy attitude/personality, "Reporting for duty, looking forward to working with you~" which I suppose is sufficiently different from the others to be interesting/complementary, I hope the above dude eventually uploads more of those lil scenes of the chars interacting, especially involving the new ppl. EDIT: Someone seems to have compiled what her deal is here: https://evangelion.fandom.com/wiki/Kotone_Suzunami

[]: [Game] Evangelion Battlefields             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Oct 28, 2020 6:39 am All the information I can find on this game are descriptions of its gameplay mechanics, along with some images and brief descriptions of the two new characters introduced. Does anyone have any detailed information? Is it actually set in Rebuild of Evangelion , or does it simply borrow characters (e.g. Mari), designs and names (Asuka is Shikinami rather than Souryuu) from it? Does it have any sort of storyline, or does it simply exist in some sort of vague "limbo"? Do the new characters get explored and given character depth? In particular, what sets Kotone's personality (described as "bubbly", "bright and happy") apart from Mana's?

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Oct 28, 2020 9:47 am to the extent of my knowledge, it is just a fighting game like Battle Orchestra and Breaking Dawn before it, essentially taking the established setting and just doing whatever with it. the wiki article Kendrix posted seems to be the extent of characterization she has gotten

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Oct 28, 2020 10:29 am Typed in Kotone Suzunami in Youtube and got two videos of her chatting to Gendo. Turn on the Youtube Closed Captions and you get translations. Yep. She's a cutie alright and I like her. 01. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cvksNAO3uHA 02. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lhHdBlb7URU This account is also putting up a lot of clips from the game. All with translations. https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBFUw2UPg1plQ-DabqSqucA/videos

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Oct 28, 2020 1:34 pm Well, those two videos at least add one thing: She's doing up-close surveillance on the pilots for Gendou for some unknown reason, though she seems to have had a different impression of what she was doing (perhaps believing that Gendou was trying to look out for his son, not knowing that he views them merely as pawns) and at least has enough moral scruples to find it and Gendou's apathy morally questionable. Still does leave her like an ersatz for Mana, only with her affiliation being to Gendou rather than the Japanese government. Also, I can understand if the staff wants to keep the conversation in a single thread, but can we at least change the title to something that isn't so obviously outdated?

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields" to release in 2020.             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Oct 28, 2020 2:30 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: Also, I can understand if the staff wants to keep the conversation in a single thread, but can we at least change the title to something that isn't so obviously outdated?

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields"             Quote Post by Lavinius » Wed Oct 28, 2020 3:54 pm Mana is much cuter.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Wed Oct 28, 2020 4:24 pm Lavinius wrote: Mana is much cuter.

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields"             Quote Post by Lavinius » Wed Oct 28, 2020 4:30 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: And more developed as a character. Kotone's best chance at this point is to get the Mari treatment, i.e. somehow prove popular enough that she feature in doujinshi and a sort of common portrayal emerges from enough of them that is viable for mainstream usage (in Mari's case, being a sexually open-minded free spirit).

[]: Re: [Game] "Evangelion Battlefields"             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Thu Oct 29, 2020 4:12 am Lavinius wrote: Mm. I'm also a little miffed by how every extracanonical pilot must be a girl and half-Japanese at the least.
